author: mark
text:
Materialize .balls/tasks symlink in master_url mode

bl-ffb4's master_url leg bypasses setup_state_branch entirely, so the convenience symlink .balls/tasks -> worktree/.balls/tasks that the legacy leg drops via ensure_tasks_symlink was never recreated for master_url repos. bl itself worked (Store routes through tasks_dir_path), but the README-advertised ergonomic — engineers on main can ls/cat/$EDITOR through .balls/tasks/ without any balls-specific knowledge — was missing on every master_url-configured clone.

Parameterize ensure_tasks_symlink with the relative target, promote it to pub(crate), and call it from state_repo::ensure with the swapped target state-repo/.balls/tasks (alongside the existing worktree/.balls/tasks call site). The bl-init refusal-on-non-symlink guard is preserved across both call sites — silently adopting a stray non-symlink could shadow uncommitted task files.
